error.msg: Guarantee that header file names are unique
error.verbose: Guarantee that header file names are unique

error.msg: Do not dereference null pointers
error.verbose: Do not dereference null pointers

error.msg: Do not dereference null pointers
error.verbose: Do not dereference null pointers

error.msg: A conversion should not be performed from pointer to void into pointer to object
error.verbose: A conversion should not be performed from pointer to void into pointer to object

error.msg: Dynamic memory allocation shall not be used. Standard library function malloc() is used
error.verbose: Dynamic memory allocation shall not be used. Standard library function malloc() is used

error.msg: The memory allocation and deallocation functions of <stdlib.h> shall not be used
error.verbose: The memory allocation and deallocation functions of <stdlib.h> shall not be used

error.msg: Dynamic memory allocation shall not be used. Standard library function free() is used
error.verbose: Dynamic memory allocation shall not be used. Standard library function free() is used

error.msg: A loop counter shall not have essentially floating type
